topic: My office parking spot has my name and a death date painted on the curb.
title: My Name And A Death Date Painted On My Parking Spot | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My office parking spot had my full name and a death date painted on the curb.
scenes.image_prompt: a concrete parking curb with faded white painted lettering, dim underground garage, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park in the same spot every workday.
scenes.image_prompt: a numbered space in an empty office parking garage, flickering fluorescent light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
a parking level pillar marked with a worn number, dim concrete garage, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Monday the curb was freshly painted with letters.
scenes.image_prompt: a wet white painted curb with crisp lettering, drips still glistening, dim garage lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was my name. The date was this Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: a close composition of painted curb lettering partly in shadow, single overhead light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I reported it. The cameras showed no one painting it.
scenes.image_prompt: a security monitor showing a grainy empty parking garage, dim control room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I painted over it myself that evening.
scenes.image_prompt: hands rolling grey paint over a curb in a dim garage, paint can nearby, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the name bled back through, darker.
scenes.image_prompt: a grey curb with dark lettering ghosting up through the fresh paint, dim fluorescent light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every other spot stayed blank. Only mine kept the date.
scenes.image_prompt: a row of clean parking curbs with one marked curb among them, dim garage, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On Friday a car was already parked there, mine, engine warm.
scenes.image_prompt: a sedan parked in a numbered garage spot, faint exhaust haze, dim overhead light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never drove it there. I had been home all day.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty home driveway at dusk with no car, porch light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The date on the curb now reads tomorrow.
scenes.image_prompt: a parking curb with freshly altered painted numbers, single garage lamp, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
